key.name: monitor-path
key.summary: Directory path to monitor for ADMX files
key.description: Path to the directory containing ADMX policy definition files. The service will monitor this directory for changes and reload data automatically.

key.name: sysvol-path
key.description: Path to the FreeIPA sysvol directory where GPT structures are stored.

key.name: locale
key.description: Locale to use when parsing ADMX/ADML files (e.g., 'ru-RU', 'en-US'). Empty string means use system locale.
